title: 2026-06-22 Shino Copenhagen Rhubarb Solstice
summary: Shino character-day reinterpretation of the Copenhagen rhubarb solstice daily set, preserving Shino identity while showing bike repair at Superkilen, a rhubarb jacket at Designmuseum Danmark, a softer Nyhavn canal wait, and two Islands Brygge harbor-bath afterglow moments.
summaryJa: 紫乃のコペンハーゲン日常アルバム。色の軸はルバーブレッド。構成は自転車修理、ミュージアム、水辺、ハーバーバスの余韻。

images.alt: Shino, adult 25, fixing a loose bicycle chain at Superkilen park in Copenhagen on 2026-06-22, wearing a cropped white camp-collar shirt, navy tailored wrap skort with practical shorts, rhubarb-red belt pouch, low white socks, black flat slingback shoes, and a small fish charm on the bike key
images.title: 01 Weekend Superkilen bike chain

images.alt: Shino, adult 25, leaving a Designmuseum Danmark courtyard-like setting in Copenhagen on 2026-06-22, half-wearing a rhubarb-red sculptural cropped jacket over an off-white sleeveless square-cut top, graphite wide culotte trousers, dark low slingback pumps, slim glasses, black clutch, and tiny fish pin
images.title: 02 Mode Designmuseum rhubarb jacket

images.alt: Shino, adult 25, waiting beside Nyhavn canal in Copenhagen on 2026-06-22 long evening light, holding a tiny wildflower and route note while wearing a black square-neck tank, sheer ivory short-sleeve overshirt tied at the waist, rhubarb-red bias mini skirt, bare legs, brown low-heel mules, woven shoulder bag, red glass ring, and fish charm
images.title: 03 Date Nyhavn rhubarb mini

images.alt: Shino, adult 25, folding a towel on the wooden deck at Islands Brygge harbor bath in Copenhagen on 2026-06-22 after swimming, wearing a black ribbed one-piece swimsuit as functional swimwear, loose pale-blue linen shirt, rhubarb-red wrap sarong over modest black swim shorts, flat black sandals, and fish-shaped waterproof charm
images.title: 04 Resort Islands Brygge harbor bath

images.alt: Shino, adult 25, seated on the wooden deck at Islands Brygge harbor bath in Copenhagen on 2026-06-22, carefully fixing the ankle strap of a black flat sandal after swimming, wearing a black ribbed one-piece swimsuit as functional swimwear, loose pale-blue linen shirt, rhubarb-red wrap sarong over modest black swim shorts, clear pouch, towel, and fish-shaped waterproof charm
images.title: 05 Resort Islands Brygge sandal strap
